channel.title: Monerica - Newest and Sponsored Listings
channel.description: The latest additions and sponsors in our directory.

item.title: ✅ xChange.me (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : No kyc instant exchange since 2017. Tor mirror, CLI client, fully anonymous, private and safe. - Contact: @xchange_me_

item.title: 0trace
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Instant private cryptocurrency exchange service. Built for fast cross-network exchange with no logs and tracking. - Contact: @0trace_io

item.title: WTF is XMR?
item.description: Education > Guides : Complete Monero Privacy Guide

item.title: Lurk
item.description: Exchanges > Aggregators : Non-custodial cross-chain swap aggregator. No registration, no KYC, no data collection. - Note: XMR swaps route natively through THORChain. No freeze possible regardless of amount.

item.title: LibreGuide
item.description: Non-Profits > Media : The guide to independent news. - Processor: MoneroPay

item.title: Diyar Ciftci Node
item.description: Nodes > Public Remote Nodes & Operators : Public Monero node. - Contact: diyarciftci@protonmail.com

item.title: OzPeps
item.description: Businesses > Medical/ Pharmaceutical Treatments : Research-grade peptides for Australian researchers. COA-verified products including BPC-157, GHK-Cu, MOTS-C, Retatrutide and more. Express Post shipping. XMR payment no KYC - Processor: BTCPay Server - Contact: support@ozpeps.is

item.title: Shadowdesk.io
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Non-custodial swap aggregator routing assets through Monero (XMR) to enhance transaction privacy. - Note: disable Shadow Route for XMR swap

item.title: RetaLABS
item.description: Businesses > Medical/ Pharmaceutical Treatments : Australian-owned online store supplying research-grade lyophilised peptides to researchers and laboratories. Ships Australia-wide via Express Post. - Processor: BTCPay Server - Contact: support@retalabs.is

item.title: ProBiller
item.description: Merchant Services > Integrations : A secure online payment solution handling millions of transactions for innovative businesses around the world every month. - Location: 96-197 Old Nicosia-Limassol Road, Dali Industrial Zone 2540, Block 1

item.title: Ava Holyass
item.description: Businesses > Pornography & Adult Products : Official adult videos, themed collections, direct bundles and private delivery. - Processor: Custom

item.title: GrifHost.com
item.description: Web Hosting > Domain Registration & DNS Services : We offer high-quality and affordable web hosting, domain registration, email marketing services (SMTP), and RDPs. We don't require any kind of KYC verification.

item.title: Minimal.Blog
item.description: Businesses > IT Services : Get your own minimal blog online in seconds, no complicated setup, no ads, no distractions, just blogging.

item.title: Mukhost
item.description: Web Hosting > VPS & Dedicated Server Providers : A UK-based hosting company committed to delivering powerful, secure, and affordable hosting service. - Processor: Cryptomus

item.title: Monero Avg. Transaction Fee historical chart
item.description: Utilities > Transactions : Average transaction fee, USD

item.title: PriEco
item.description: Non-Profits > Search Engines : Fair general purpose web search engine - Contact: @PriEcoSearch

item.title: DNSProxy
item.description: Businesses > Proxies : DDoS protection - Location: Buenos Aires, 9821, Dupler - Processor: NOWPayments

item.title: Get Rate
item.description: Exchanges > Aggregators : Сryptocurrency exchange monitor that helps you find the best rates for buying and selling digital currency.

item.title: CryptoZapravka
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Service for fast and secure exchange of electronic currencies.

item.title: Qubicall
item.description: Businesses > Phone Plans, SMS & SIM Cards : International phone calls at a fraction of the carrier's price. - Processor: OxaPay

item.title: Monero Merchant
item.description: Merchant Services > Open Source Projects : FOSS Monero Point of Sale (POS) Android App - Contact: https://github.com/ajs-xmr

item.title: Monero Coalition
item.description: Non-Profits > Activism : Group dedicated to advancing the adoption of Monero.

item.title: XMRpriced
item.description: Finance > Price Display : A browser extension that displays XMR prices alongside USD on any online store. Shop with a Monero mindset.

item.title: MoodSIM
item.description: Businesses > Phone Plans, SMS & SIM Cards : Buy, scan, connect - Processor: NOWPayments

item.title: disapeer
item.description: Exchanges > Messenger : A privacy-preserving on and offramp which connects to wallets.

item.title: Call Me HEMP
item.description: Businesses > Medical/ Pharmaceutical Treatments : Federally Legal Cannabis – Ships Discreetly. All of our products are federally legal. - Note: Save 50% off at checkout with Monero - Location: 65 Merrimon Ave #1004, Asheville NC 28801 - Processor: MyCryptoCheckout - Contact: support@callmehemp.com

item.title: xmr-shop.eth
item.description: Businesses > Proxy Shopping : Buy anything & Pay with Monero. Thousands of products: electronics, laptops, phones audiobooks & more. No accounts, no tracking, no middlemen. Fully private. - Contact: https://xmr-shop.eth.limo/#/contact

item.title: Monero.Software
item.description:
Freelancers > Software Developers : I am Nolan, providing affordable development service for community.
Hourly rate is 15$/h ~ 0.045 XMR/h - Note: If you are NGO, we can discuss about rate. - Location: South East Asia - ICT (UTC+7) Timezone - Processor: Direct to wallet - Contact: Email: hi@monero.software

item.title: Secrex
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : No KYC, No AML modern cryptocurrency exchange service designed with a focus on convenience, anonymity, transparency, and operational stability. - Contact: https://t.me/secret_ex

item.title: ✅ BitXchange (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Privacy-focused exchange for Monero, Bitcoin, Ethereum & more. Wide pair selection. Fast swaps. 24/7 support. - Contact: BitXchange_io

item.title: Navi Land
item.description: Businesses > Email Providers/ Forwarders : A stable, private email service. We don't track you, we don't sell your data, and we don't annoy you with ads. We provide standard email (IMAP/SMTP) that just works.

item.title: ❓ MoneroFlow
item.description:
Merchant Services > Open Source Projects : Comprehensive Monero POS and accounting System. Fully Open Source. XMR referral rewards system.
Accept Monero Instantly, without giving up custody. - Processor: Monero Gateway - Contact: https://docs.moneroflow.com/wiki.html

item.title: Anon Raffle
item.description: Businesses > Gambling : Monero based raffle with provably fair draws, low fees, and prizes including XMR payouts & firearms. - Processor: Direct to wallet - Contact: https://x.com/anon_raffle

item.title: ✅ MoneroShameList.com
item.description: Other Directories > Miscellaneous : Companies that market themselves as privacy-focused but refuse to accept Monero — the only truly private money. - Note: Sponsored by Monerica

item.title: BTC Burger
item.description: Finance > Conversion : Compares different cryptocurrencies to commodities like burgers to see how many you can get for 1 unit

item.title: PrivacyOpSec
item.description: Businesses > Electronics/ Computer Hardware : Crypto store for OpSec and Security gadgets - Note: 5% Monero discount

item.title: Swapzilla
item.description: Exchanges > Aggregators : Crypto swap aggregator that compares rates across multiple exchangers instantly. Enter the amount, see the best rate, and swap directly from your wallet. No registration. - Contact: https://x.com/swapzilla_io

item.title: XMR Land
item.description: Other Directories > Business Directories : Discover wallets, exchanges, mining tools, and services powering the Monero ecosystem.

item.title: tomboi.io
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Create an exchange request in one form, no JavaScript required.

item.title: Monero SuperPay
item.description: Merchant Services > Open Source Projects : Self-hosted, privacy-first point of sale. Accept Monero payments at any business.

item.title: YT-DLP online
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : Download videos from various websites using yt-dlp command-line tool in browsers.

item.title: Mobit
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Fast, Secure, No KYC, No JS, No Logs.

item.title: IsItKYC
item.description: Other Directories > Crypto Exchanges : Check any crypto exchange. See whether it requires KYC before you sign up.

item.title: ❓ monero-web
item.description: Wallets > Web Wallets : Non-custodial web wallet with client-side transaction signing. Keys never leave the browser. Supports seed phrases, spend/view keys, and view-only mode. - Note: Self-hostable. SHA-256 file verification page included. - Contact: @Medtabka on GitHub

item.title: ✅ OctoSwap (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Private swap/ Never KYC/ Any AML, Low Fees (0.5-1% base) 24/7 support, high liquidity - Contact: support@octoswap.io

item.title: ❓ NoData Hosting Solutions
item.description: Web Hosting > Offshore & Privacy-Focused Hosting : Offshore Iceland NVMe VPS, CloudLinux & Bare-Metal. Tor friendly. Our team maintains a strict no-logs & privacy commitment. - Note: Unclear if company is responding to customer - Location: Keflavík - Processor: BTCPay Server - Contact: admin@nodata.pw

item.title: ✅ SageSwap (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Never KYC, No AML, No Login, and No JavaScript. Fast and private swap service. - Note: 1-2% FEE | 24/7 - Contact: https://SageSwap.io/Support

item.title: ✅ MoneroMarketCap
item.description: Finance > Market Cap Comparision : Crypto market capitalization priced in Monero with portfolio management. - Note: Built by Monerica

item.title: ❓ MoneroIndex.com
item.description: Other Directories > Business Directories : Directory of Monero friendly business - Note: promotes questionable listings which were disallowed to be sponsors on Monerica, likely connected to SolvoCard.com, AnonRefill.com and "Richard Fore"

item.title: AscendEX
item.description: Exchanges > Centralized Exchanges : Trading and earning platform.

item.title: LuxHost
item.description: Web Hosting > VPS & Dedicated Server Providers : Powerful Virtual Servers with 2 GBit/s network for any application. - Processor: Cryptomus

item.title: Ward's ACE & Country Store - Firearms
item.description: Businesses > Weapons & Self-Defense : A locally owned country store stocking 550+ firearms — pistols, revolvers, rifles, and shotguns from brands like Glock, Ruger, S&W, Sig Sauer, Henry, and Mossberg. - Note: 3% Monero discount - Location: 65 N 300 E Malad City - Processor: Monero Gateway - Contact: @wardsace

item.title: Peerz
item.description: Exchanges > Miscellaneous : Trade crypto in real life. Find people who want to trade in the map. Talk end-to-end encrypted, arrange meeting and transact fully offline. No KYC, free. - Note: No email, password. You need any web3 wallet to create your own offer and talk with other peers. - Location: Worldwide - Contact: @itspeerz on X.

item.title: DEX.fo
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Automatic cryptocurrency exchange. Zero KYC, zero AML, zero registration. No IP collection, no metadata logging. - Contact: https://smp16.simplex.im/a#1KxGbAL_XTN4X9NKJI8aIR91A2Dd4bSzo5rGraufqKU

item.title: custodial.fail
item.description: Exchanges > Aggregators : Swap Cryptocurrencies

item.title: Symbiosis
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Swap cross-chain instantly. - Note: VPN access prohibited

item.title: UnCard
item.description: Cards > Prepaid Cards : Instant virtual cards

item.title: ❓ SolvoCard.com
item.description: Cards > Prepaid Cards : Get a No KYC debit card that works with Apple/Google Pay & 3DS Secure worldwide. Signup with only your email in seconds. - Note: misrepresented business, technical errors with emails, attempts at bribes under the guise of "donation", associated with AnonRefill.com - Processor: Cryptomus

item.title: ❓ XMRVCC
item.description: Cards > Prepaid Cards : Privacy-first service offering disposable VCCs for XMR. No-KYC and zero personal info required. Secure your online footprint with untraceable payments. - Note: delivery over website and Telegram. - Processor: NOWPayments - Contact: contact@xmrvcc.com

item.title: acechange.io
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Anonymous crypto exchange - Location: Hlavná 47, 930 35 Michal na Ostrove

item.title: Session
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : An end-to-end encrypted messenger that protects your private data. A decentralized app designed, built, and operated by a global community of privacy experts. - Note: Donate via silent donor.

item.title: Bitcosa
item.description: Businesses > Clothing, Apparel & Accessories : Warehouse liquidating various clothing, accessories, hobbies products. - Location: Puerto Banús - Processor: Direct to wallet - Contact: ak@xmark.cc

item.title: Zerion Chat
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : End-to-end encrypted messenger that runs entirely over Tor. Messages travel directly between devices. Nothing in the middle to hack, subpoena, or shut down.

item.title: Monero.st
item.description: Nodes > Public Remote Nodes & Operators : Public remote node sponsored by Mynymbox.

item.title: ❓ AnonRefill.com
item.description: Cards > Gift & Prepaid Cards : eSIM Data, Gift Cards, Game Cards, Visa/Mastercard & E-money. Instant access. - Note: sign up link uses localhost, clearly not working correctly - Processor: Heleket - Contact: @anonrefill

item.title: ✅ I2Pd
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : i2pd (I2P Daemon) is a full-featured C++ implementation of I2P client - Processor: Direct to wallet

item.title: ✅ I2P Project
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : I2P (Invisible Internet Project) is a decentralized, privacy-focused network that allows people to communicate and share information anonymously. - Processor: Direct to wallet

item.title: Constellation Directory
item.description: Other Directories > Business Directories : A curated directory of Monero-friendly businesses, services, and communities across the clearnet and Telegram. Browse by category, check live site status, and submit. - Location: Freedom, CA - Contact: @ConstellatonDirectory

item.title: ❌ Monero multiplier
item.description: Businesses > Gambling : Multiply your XMR by 7x entering a pyramid structure that pays out automatically after 11 investors enter behind you. Currently 4 tiers ranging from .01 XMR to 5 XMR. - Note: This is a ponzi scheme, this is a well known type of scam and it is not sustainable, so someone will always lose money. - Processor: Direct to wallet - Contact: @xmrpyramid

item.title: XCancel
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : Twitter/X frontend focused on privacy and performance. Free, open-source, no account, no JavaScript, no ads. - Note: Nitter instance

item.title: Pyro
item.description: Web Hosting > Gaming Servers : IaaS provider offering game server hosting, virtual private servers, and dedicated servers, incorporated in Delaware. - Note: We comply with local law enforcement and forward DMCA requests directly to customers. We are not a bulletproof host. - Location: Delaware - Processor: Custom - Contact: X: @withpyro, Bluesky: @pyro.host, support tickets available on portal.

item.title: Bitcoin.com Checkout
item.description: Merchant Services > Integrations : Accept crypto payments in seconds.

item.title: 404.cash
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Add a privacy-first crypto swap widget to any website in 30 seconds.

item.title: KYC.RIP
item.description: Exchanges > Aggregators : No-KYC exchange aggregator. Compares rates from 16 swap engines across 4,600+ coins to find the best deal. Ghost Mode for privacy routing. - Processor: Custom

item.title: walls.rip
item.description: Businesses > Digital Goods/ Services : Privacy tools: Ghost Mail, Dead Drop (encrypted file sharing), SMS Wall (disposable numbers), eSIM (anonymous data plans), Ghost Chat (encrypted messaging). - Processor: Direct to wallet

item.title: Fujn Swap
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : An instant, automated crypto exchange with no accounts needed, no KYC and full privacy. - Contact: @Fujn_BTC

item.title: monero-csharp
item.description: Utilities > Open Source Projects : Library for interacting with Monero daemon and wallet RPCs.

item.title: ❌ IncoCard.com
item.description: Cards > Prepaid Cards : Get instant virtual and physical cards. Apple/Google Pay No KYC, no ID verification. - Note: nothing happens after payment, chat box disappears after they say they are looking into problem, account no longer works, avoid - Processor: Custom

item.title: nokycswap.com
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Anonymous Crypto Exchange

item.title: PrivacyGateway.io - Prepaid Cards
item.description: Cards > Prepaid Cards : Visa virtual card

item.title: Freedom of the Press Foundation
item.description: Non-Profits > Media : Supports free speech and freedom of the press. Develops software to support the digital security of journalists and their sources. Conducts legal advocacy for journalists.

item.title: LibreFit
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : A free and open-source workout tracker designed with privacy in mind.

item.title: Sapfirex
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Instant exchange

item.title: Tarifex
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Instant exchange at any time of the day.

item.title: Bitsz
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Fast transaction processing, minimal fees and reliable security.

item.title: Socks Proxy
item.description: Businesses > Proxies : Reliable SOCKS5 proxies. Bypass geo-blocks. Protect your privacy.

item.title: Peptimal.com
item.description: Businesses > Medical/ Pharmaceutical Treatments : Premium Peptides for Advanced Research Lab-tested, HPLC-verified peptides with 99%+ purity. - Processor: NOWPayments - Contact: support@peptimal.com

item.title: YiFi
item.description: Exchanges > Aggregators : Earn and swap are modular DeFi tools—Earn automates one-click yield strategies with no custody, while Swap aggregates liquidity across DEX, CEX, and private sources. - Location: Panama City - Contact: marketing@yifi.io

item.title: PressReleased
item.description: Non-Profits > Knowledge : Paywall bypass

item.title: Sh1n
item.description: Non-Profits > Activism : An Iranian providing multiple OSINT and safety related sources. - Processor: NOWPayments

item.title: XMR Pay
item.description: Merchant Services > Miscellaneous : Create a Monero invoice with expiration

item.title: ✅ CypherGoat (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Aggregators : Non-custodial swap aggregator for private crypto exchanges. Find the best rate across trusted providers and swap instantly. - Location: Sweden

item.title: p2pchange.is
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : A crypto exchange for instant and secure cryptocurrency swaps at competitive rates. Supports popular cryptocurrencies, offers transparent conditions, and no registration.

item.title: Currex
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Crypto exchange service

item.title: DotWee
item.description: Web Hosting > Domain Registration & DNS Services : Secure domain provider - Location: Tsim Sha Tsui, Kowloon - Processor: Custom

item.title: RateON
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Instant crypto swaps 1500+ pairs. - Processor: Heleket - Contact: info@rateon.io

item.title: ❌ Monero Raffle
item.description: Businesses > Gambling : Monero raffle at .01 XMR to enter - Note: Associated with "XMR Pyramid"/"Monero multiplier" scam.

item.title: SwapRocket
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : No KYC Crypto Exchange & Swap

item.title: Kapkap
item.description: Finance > Price Display : Not your device, not your data. Built for the privacy-minded - Private portfolio tracker/Crypto+financial dashboard. No sign up, your data stays, encrypted, on your device. - Note: No ads. No trackers. No AI slop. Track most crypto and metals. Set alerts. Know your net worth in real time. Maintain private ledgers of your portfolio history. - Location: balkan - Processor: Custom - Contact: twitter : @kapkapApp

item.title: bypass.tools
item.description: Businesses > Digital Goods/ Services : A web-based utility that resolves destination URLs from ad-link shorteners and key systems. Supports Linkvertise, LootLabs, Work.ink, Delta, and 50+ other services. API availa - Processor: NOWPayments - Contact: support@bypass.tools

item.title: Cypher Market
item.description: Businesses > Clothing, Apparel & Accessories : We work with many FOSS projects that we believe in to sell merchandise and donate to them - Location: Las Cruces, NM - Processor: Monero Gateway

item.title: xmr.irish
item.description: Media > News Aggregators : Education, mining, network stats, and the investment thesis for Monero (XMR)

item.title: MoneroDM
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : Monero Direct Messaging

item.title: AskMonero
item.description: Communities > Reddit : A community for asking questions and sharing knowledge about Monero, privacy focused digital currency, and related tools.

item.title: Crypto Steer Monero Pool
item.description: Mining > Pools : Live pool stats, smooth miner lookup, and a refined interface directly on the pool VPS.

item.title: ✅ Silent Exchange (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Fast & Anonymous Crypto to Crypto Swaps. No email. No KYC.Trade-in Minutes. 1500+ Crypto Pairs 24/7/365 Service Fee starting from 1%. - Note: Trade using Telegram Bot - @silentexchangerobot - Contact: Telegram: @silentexchange Email: silentexchange@protonmail.com

item.title: ✅ Wagyu.xyz (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Seamlessly bridge assets between Monero and Hyperliquid with Wagyu. Private Cross-Chain Bridge. The first decentralized orderbook exchange supporting native XMR deposits. - Note: US citizens are not welcome in using any Wagyu products. - Contact: https://t.me/PerpetualCow

item.title: ✅ MoneroDice (sponsored)
item.description: Businesses > Gambling : Simple, fast, privacy-respecting dice and blackjack game. Provably fair mode for dice is available too. - Contact: contact [at] monerodice.pro

item.title: ✅ Cake Wallet (sponsored)
item.description: Wallets > Mobile Wallets : Allows you to safely store, send, receive, and exchange your XMR, BTC, and LTC (and exchange other currencies) - Location: United States

item.title: ✅ CCE Cash (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : This is a fully automated service that allows you to quickly exchange various cryptocurrencies such as XMR, BTC, ETH, and SOL without requiring identity verification. - Contact: https://x.com/Cce_Cash

item.title: ✅ Coincards (sponsored)
item.description: Cards > Gift & Prepaid Cards : Gift cards from hundreds of top brands, including Amazon, Walmart, Airbnb, Uber, DoorDash, Home Depot, and even Visa or Amex cards, with values up to $2,000. - Location: Surrey, B.C. - Processor: BTCPay Server
